name: the-squirrel
description: Genealogy research terminal. Collect fragments, build the tree, find what's misfiled. Jeles works the desk. The Binder works the back.
author: Sean Campbell

data_streams.purpose: Personal genealogy data — persons, relationships, fragments, lattice cells
data_streams.description: PII layer. SAP gate required. Stored in db.persons and db.fragments.

data_streams.purpose: User-agnostic genealogy source index — community archives, platforms, databases
data_streams.description: System layer. No PII. No gate. Stored in db.sources. 779+ community archives seeded.

data_streams.purpose: Outbound lookups — FamilySearch, FindAGrave, community archive links
data_streams.description: Transient. Deep links and API calls to external genealogy services.
